channel.title: Extending Pionia on Pionia
channel.description: Recent content in Extending Pionia on Pionia

item.title: Maintainer notes
item.description: For PioniaCore contributors — not required for app developers.

item.title: Pionia Helpers
item.description: Helpers assist in quickly accessing parts of our application without implicitly creating instances.

item.title: Composer packages
item.description: Plugins vs providers Kind Hooks into Pionia boot? Example Plugin No — plain PHP library Validator, HTTP client, DTO mapper Provider Yes — middleware, auth, routes, commands acme/pionia-billing Plugins are normal Composer packages.

item.title: App Providers
item.description: Introduction Pionia separates plugins (Composer libraries that do not hook into boot) from providers (packages or app classes that register middleware, authentication, routes, commands, logging, cache, or exception behavior).
